canonical_answer: At 12s, a hand holds a green toothbrush over the white sink basin; at 13s, the toothbrush moves upwards towards the chrome faucet; at 16s, the hand holds a white cloth alongside the green toothbrush; at 18s, the toothbrush rests near the sink with the Listerine bottle visible behind.

question: Describe the visibility and position of the cleaning products on the counter over time.
canonical_answer: At 12s, a bottle of blue liquid labeled Listerine sits behind the faucet; at 12s, a green box labeled Polident is visible in the background reflection; at 16s, a small white rectangular container sits on the counter; at 18s, a clear glass cup is visible next to the green mouthwash bottle.
